title: Redesign Admin User Profile Page
description: The current Admin User Profile page ([id].vue) uses an inconsistent 'racing/sci-fi' style that doesn't match the rest of the admin panel. Rework it to be modern, clean, and consistent with the Admin Dashboard.
steps: Remove all 'race-' prefixed CSS classes and specialized fonts (Orbitron, Michroma, Rajdhani).
Remove non-standard CSS like clip-path, skewX, and custom borders from the page.
Re-implement the layout using standard UCard, UButton, and UBadge components.
Use standard admin color tokens (var(--color-bg), var(--color-surface), var(--color-text), etc.).
Implement a professional header with standard back button and action buttons (Edit, Delete).
Design a clean profile summary section (Avatar placeholder, basic info).
Improve the Tabs component UI to match modern standards (horizontal scrolling on mobile, clean active states).
Implement data grids for General Info and Security sections using standard cards.
Implement clean tables for Orders and Addresses sections.
Ensure the layout is fully responsive (mobile-first) and uses the available screen area effectively.
Add data-testid attributes for important elements.
